description: You are an HR Analyst at Northwind Traders. Management needs a detailed analysis of the employee reporting structure using the Northwind SQLite database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/northwind.db). Using a connection named 'NorthwindHR', generate and export two reports based on the organizational hierarchy. Report A: Employee Hierarchy, including EmployeeID, FullName (First Last), Title, ManagerName (First Last), ManagementLevel (0 for top-level), and DirectReportCount, exported to /home/ga/Documents/exports/hierarchy_report.csv. Report B: Manager Summary for all employees with at least one direct report, including ManagerName, Title, DirectReportCount, TotalSubordinates (direct + indirect), and MaxDepthBelow, exported to /home/ga/Documents/exports/manager_summary.csv. Save the SQL analysis script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/hierarchy_analysis.sql. Login: ga / password123.
